channel.title: InYourBones — Bay Area Radar (far_out)
channel.description: Curated upcoming Bay Area shows from InYourBones.

item.title: Phoebe Bridgers @ Chase Center
item.description: 2026-10-28 02:30 → 2026-10-29 02:30 — Phoebe Bridgers at Chase Center. Phoebe Bridgers is a critically acclaimed indie artist with a strong live reputation, making her tour highly anticipated.

item.title: beabadoobee @ Oakland Arena
item.description: 2026-10-27 03:00 — beabadoobee at Oakland Arena. beabadoobee has gained significant buzz in the indie scene and her live performances are known for their energy.

item.title: Lenny Pearce @ Fox Theater - Oakland
item.description: 2026-10-28 01:00 — Lenny Pearce at Fox Theater - Oakland. Lenny Pearce's Toddler Rave concept is unique and appealing to families looking for fun, interactive experiences.

item.title: Slow Pulp @ The Fillmore
item.description: 2026-10-28 03:00 — Slow Pulp at The Fillmore. Slow Pulp's blend of indie rock and emotive lyrics has earned them a strong following, making their show at The Fillmore noteworthy.

item.title: Teddy Swims @ Chase Center
item.description: 2026-11-11 03:00 — Teddy Swims at Chase Center. Teddy Swims is known for his powerful vocals and engaging performances, appealing to a diverse audience.

item.title: Grace Enger @ August Hall
item.description: 2026-10-28 03:00 — Grace Enger at August Hall. Grace Enger's music has a fresh sound that resonates with indie pop fans, making her tour one to watch.

item.title: Gorillaz @ Oakland Arena
item.description: 2026-10-29 02:00 — Gorillaz at Oakland Arena. Gorillaz's innovative approach to live shows and their extensive catalog make this a must-see event.

item.title: Gracie Abrams @ Oakland Arena
item.description: 2026-12-07 04:00 — Gracie Abrams at Oakland Arena. Gracie Abrams is emerging as a significant voice in pop music, and her tour is generating considerable excitement.

item.title: Journey @ Chase Center
item.description: 2026-11-29 03:30 — Journey at Chase Center. Niall Horan's blend of pop and heartfelt lyrics appeals to a wide audience, making his concert a notable event.

item.title: John Summit @ Oakland Arena
item.description: 2026-12-05 03:00 — John Summit at Oakland Arena. John Summit's electronic music is gaining traction in the dance scene, promising an energetic live experience.

item.title: KATSEYE @ Oakland Arena
item.description: 2026-11-20 04:00 — KATSEYE at Oakland Arena. KATSEYE's unique sound and performance style make their tour an intriguing option for electronic music fans.

item.title: The Smashing Pumpkins @ SAP Center at San Jose
item.description: 2026-11-09 04:00 — The Smashing Pumpkins at SAP Center at San Jose. The Smashing Pumpkins' nostalgia factor and their legacy in rock music make this tour a compelling event.

item.title: Bryson Tiller @ Toyota Pavilion at Concord
item.description: 2026-10-28 02:30 — Bryson Tiller at Toyota Pavilion at Concord. Bryson Tiller's neo-soul sound and engaging performances attract a dedicated fanbase, making his tour significant.

item.title: Olivia Rodrigo @ Oakland Arena
item.description: 2026-12-12 03:00 — Olivia Rodrigo at Oakland Arena. Olivia Rodrigo's rise in pop music and her passionate performances make her tour a highly anticipated event.

item.title: The Mountain Goats @ The Fillmore
item.description: 2026-11-16 04:00 → 2026-11-22 04:00 — The Mountain Goats at The Fillmore. The Mountain Goats are known for their storytelling and intimate live performances, appealing to indie folk fans.
